controls.control_objective: To ensure 25, 2026) table of contents chapter-i preliminary
controls.control_description:
भारतीय įरज़वर् बैंक

RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
RBI/DOR/2025-26/273 DOR.GOV.REC.No.192/18.10.014/2025-26 November 28, 2025
Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Governance) Directions,
2025 (Updated as on May 25, 2026)
Table of contents
Chapter-I Preliminary ...............................................................................................
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 25, 2026) table of contents chapter-i preliminary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Urban Co-operative
Banks - Governance) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to urban co-operative banks, hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as 'ucb'
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be applicable to Urban Co-operative
Banks, hereinafter collectively referred to as 'UCBs' and individually as 'UCB'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to urban co-operative banks, hereinafter collectively referred to as 'ucbs' and individually as 'ucb'

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
In this context, urban co-operative banks shall mean Primary Co-operative Banks
as defined under section 5(ccv) read with Section 56 of Banking Regulation Act,
1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean primary co-operative banks as defined under section 5(ccv) read with section 56 of banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'board' means the board of directors ('bod') or the governing body of a ucb, by whatever name called, to
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Board' means the Board of Directors ('BoD') or the governing body of a UCB,
by whatever name called, to which the direction and control of the
management of affairs of the UCB is entrusted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'board' means the board of directors ('bod') or the governing body of a ucb, by whatever name called, to

controls.control_objective: To ensure a director appointed on the board of a ucb, by way of election or co-option or in any other manner as per the applicable laws
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Director' means a director appointed on the Board of a UCB, by way of
election or co-option or in any other manner as per the applicable laws.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a director appointed on the board of a ucb, by way of election or co-option or in any other manner as per the applicable laws

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a primary co-operative bank whose membership is confined to persons who are or were employed in an institution or a group of institutions and rec
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Salary Earners' Co-operative Bank' shall mean a primary co-operative bank
whose membership is confined to persons who are or were employed in an
institution or a group of institutions and recognised as such by the Reserve
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a primary co-operative bank whose membership is confined to persons who are or were employed in an institution or a group of institutions and rec

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory mo
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or the
Banking Regulation Act, 1949, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI or as used in common or
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the reserve bank of india act, 1934 or the banking regulation act, 1949, or any statutory mo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be knowledgeable and persons of high integrity
controls.control_description:
The directors on the Board of a UCB should be knowledgeable and persons of
high integrity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be knowledgeable and persons of high integrity

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at all times, have at least two professional directors, i
controls.control_description:
To ensure professionalism in the Board, a UCB shall, at all times,
have at least two professional directors, i.e., persons with suitable banking
experience (at middle / senior management level) or with relevant professional
qualification in the fields of law, accountancy or finance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at all times, have at least two professional directors, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a suitable provision in its byelaws to ensure the same
controls.control_description:
The UCB should have a
suitable provision in its byelaws to ensure the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a suitable provision in its byelaws to ensure the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mandatory in the case of a ucb which is a salary earners' co-operative bank
controls.control_description:
Provided that, the requirement of having at least two professional directors shall
not be mandatory in the case of a UCB which is a Salary Earners' Co-operative
Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mandatory in the case of a ucb which is a salary earners' co-operative bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the eligibility, qualification and disqualification criteria for directors as prescribed in the br act and the co-operative laws governing
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall comply with the eligibility, qualification and disqualification criteria
for directors as prescribed in the BR Act and the co-operative laws governing it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the eligibility, qualification and disqualification criteria for directors as prescribed in the br act and the co-operative laws governing

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to become directors of a ucb: (1) a person who is not eligible for admission as a member of the ucb (except co-opted and nominated directo
controls.control_description:
In particular, the following persons shall not be eligible to become directors of a
UCB:
(1) a person who is not eligible for admission as a member of the UCB (except
co-opted and nominated directors);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to become directors of a ucb: (1) a person who is not eligible for admission as a member of the ucb (except co-opted and nominated directo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to be re-appointed, whether by election or co- option or in any other manner, as a director on the board of the same ucb only after underg
controls.control_description:
A director on the Board of a UCB, after completing a continuous tenure of ten
years in office, shall be eligible to be re-appointed, whether by election or co-
option or in any other manner, as a director on the Board of the same UCB only
after undergoing a minimum cooling-off period of three years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to be re-appointed, whether by election or co- option or in any other manner, as a director on the board of the same ucb only after underg

controls.control_objective: To ensure be associated with the ucb in any capacity / manner other than as a member / customer
controls.control_description:
During the cooling-
off period, the said director shall not be associated with the UCB in any capacity
/ manner other than as a member / customer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be associated with the ucb in any capacity / manner other than as a member / customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure preclude him / her from being appointed as a director on the board of another bank
controls.control_description:
This, however, shall not preclude
him / her from being appointed as a director on the Board of another bank, if
otherwise eligible.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preclude him / her from being appointed as a director on the board of another bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure 25, 2026 vide reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - governance) amendment directions, 2026 dated may 25, 2026
controls.control_description: 1 Inserted with effect from May 25, 2026 vide Reserve bank of India (Urban Co-operative Banks - Governance) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated May 25, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 25, 2026 vide reserve bank of india (urban co-operative banks - governance) amendment directions, 2026 dated may 25, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned
controls.control_description:
<image>
Explanation:
For calculating the period of continuous tenure, the total time served on the Board
of the UCB including the period of directorship preceding an interruption of less
than three years but excluding the period of directorship preceding at least a
three-year interruption shall be reckoned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned

controls.control_objective: To ensure create any honorary positions or titles at board level or confer titles that are non-statutory in nature
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall not create any honorary positions or titles at Board level or confer
titles that are non-statutory in nature.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to create any honorary positions or titles at board level or confer titles that are non-statutory in nature

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure to place all circulars and other material relating to policies issued by the rbi before its board for information and appropriate action
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall ensure to place all circulars and other material relating to policies
issued by the RBI before its Board for information and appropriate action.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure to place all circulars and other material relating to policies issued by the rbi before its board for information and appropriate action

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish full facts and complete papers to the directors well in advance of board meetings as also all additional information / clarification that the
controls.control_description:
Further,
the management shall furnish full facts and complete papers to the directors well
in advance of Board meetings as also all additional information / clarification that
the directors may seek before taking a decision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish full facts and complete papers to the directors well in advance of board meetings as also all additional information / clarification that the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided inter alia by the following guidelines: (1) the directors should attend board meetings regularly and effectively
controls.control_description:
In addition to their specified duties, responsibilities, rights or obligations outlined
or laid down in the relevant statutes, as applicable, the directors of a UCB shall
be guided inter alia by the following guidelines:
(1) The directors should attend Board meetings regularly and effectively.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be guided inter alia by the following guidelines: (1) the directors should attend board meetings regularly and effectively

controls.control_objective: To ensure study the board papers thoroughly and seek the assistance of the md / ceo for eliciting any information at the board meetings
controls.control_description:
They
should study the Board papers thoroughly and seek the assistance of the MD
/ CEO for eliciting any information at the Board meetings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to study the board papers thoroughly and seek the assistance of the md / ceo for eliciting any information at the board meetings

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, not directly call for papers / files / notes recorded by various departments for scrutiny, etc
controls.control_description:
They should,
however, not directly call for papers / files / notes recorded by various
departments for scrutiny, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, not directly call for papers / files / notes recorded by various departments for scrutiny, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure reveal any information relating to any constituent of the ucb to anyone as they are under the oath of secrecy and fidelity
controls.control_description:
They should not reveal any information relating to any
constituent of the UCB to anyone as they are under the oath of secrecy and
fidelity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reveal any information relating to any constituent of the ucb to anyone as they are under the oath of secrecy and fidelity

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve themselves thoroughly in the matter of formulation of general policy and ensure that performance of the ucb is <image> monitored adequately at
controls.control_description:
(3) The directors should involve themselves thoroughly in the matter of
formulation of general policy and ensure that performance of the UCB is
<image>
monitored adequately at the Board level.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to involve themselves thoroughly in the matter of formulation of general policy and ensure that performance of the ucb is <image> monitored adequately at

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue / give any instructions / direction to any individual officer / employee of the ucb in any manner and should also discourage the individual offi
controls.control_description:
They should not issue / give any
instructions / direction to any individual officer / employee of the UCB in any
manner and should also discourage the individual officer / employee or unions
from approaching them in any manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue / give any instructions / direction to any individual officer / employee of the ucb in any manner and should also discourage the individual offi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be familiar with the broad objectives of the ucb and the policies laid down by rbi
controls.control_description:
(4) The directors should be familiar with the broad objectives of the UCB and the
policies laid down by RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be familiar with the broad objectives of the ucb and the policies laid down by rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure analyse the trends of economy, assist in the discharge of management's responsibility to public and formulation of measures to improve customer servic
controls.control_description:
They should analyse the trends of economy, assist
in the discharge of management's responsibility to public and formulation of
measures to improve customer service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to analyse the trends of economy, assist in the discharge of management's responsibility to public and formulation of measures to improve customer servic

controls.control_objective: To ensure function in a cohesive manner and provide proper leadership to manage the affairs of the ucb on smooth and efficient lines
controls.control_description:
(5) The Board should function in a cohesive manner and provide proper
leadership to manage the affairs of the UCB on smooth and efficient lines.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to function in a cohesive manner and provide proper leadership to manage the affairs of the ucb on smooth and efficient lines

controls.control_objective: To ensure work as a team and in the spirit of co-operation
controls.control_description: The directors must work as a team and in the spirit of co-operation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to work as a team and in the spirit of co-operation

controls.control_objective: To ensure oversee all critical aspects of the ucb's functioning - ranging from compliance with regulatory policies and maintenance of statutory ratios to effici
controls.control_description:
(6) The directors should oversee all critical aspects of the UCB's functioning -
ranging from compliance with regulatory policies and maintenance of
statutory ratios to efficient fund management, priority sector lending, asset
quality, recovery performance, internal controls, and operational transparency
- to ensure sound governance, financial health, and service to its members.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to oversee all critical aspects of the ucb's functioning - ranging from compliance with regulatory policies and maintenance of statutory ratios to effici

controls.control_objective: To ensure involve themselves in any matter relating to personnel administration such as appointment, transfer, posting or promotion, or redressal of individual
controls.control_description:
(7) The directors should not involve themselves in any matter relating to
personnel administration such as appointment, transfer, posting or promotion,
or redressal of individual grievances of any employee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to involve themselves in any matter relating to personnel administration such as appointment, transfer, posting or promotion, or redressal of individual

controls.control_objective: To ensure do anything which will interfere with and / or be subversive of maintenance of discipline, good conduct and integrity of the staff
controls.control_description:
They should not do
anything which will interfere with and / or be subversive of maintenance of
discipline, good conduct and integrity of the staff.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do anything which will interfere with and / or be subversive of maintenance of discipline, good conduct and integrity of the staff

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach or exert influence for sanction of any kind of facility by the ucb
controls.control_description:
(8) The directors should not approach or exert influence for sanction of any kind
of facility by the UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach or exert influence for sanction of any kind of facility by the ucb

controls.control_objective: To ensure also not sponsor any loan proposal, buildings or sites for ucb's premises, enlistment or empanelment of contractors, architects, doctors, lawyers, etc
controls.control_description:
They should also not sponsor any loan proposal,
buildings or sites for UCB's premises, enlistment or empanelment of
contractors, architects, doctors, lawyers, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also not sponsor any loan proposal, buildings or sites for ucb's premises, enlistment or empanelment of contractors, architects, doctors, lawyers, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prejudiced against individual proposals
controls.control_description:
At the same time, they should
not be prejudiced against individual proposals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prejudiced against individual proposals

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate in the board discussion if a proposal in which they are directly or indirectly interested comes up for discussion
controls.control_description:
(9) The directors should not participate in the Board discussion if a proposal in
which they are directly or indirectly interested comes up for discussion.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to participate in the board discussion if a proposal in which they are directly or indirectly interested comes up for discussion

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose their interest well in advance to the md / ceo and the board
controls.control_description:
They
should disclose their interest well in advance to the MD / CEO and the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose their interest well in advance to the md / ceo and the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure indicate their directorship of the ucb on the same
controls.control_description:
<image>
(10) The directors should not display the logos or distinctive design of the UCB
on their visiting card or letter head, although they may indicate their
directorship of the UCB on the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indicate their directorship of the ucb on the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure bestow their attention on the periodical review of important aspects of ucb's working
controls.control_description:
As specified in paragraph 11(6), directors shall bestow their attention on the
periodical review of important aspects of UCB's working.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bestow their attention on the periodical review of important aspects of ucb's working

controls.control_objective: To ensure give attention to as also the periodicity at which these shall be placed before the board is indicated below:
controls.control_description:
An illustrative list of the
reviews which directors shall give attention to as also the periodicity at which
these shall be placed before the Board is indicated below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give attention to as also the periodicity at which these shall be placed before the board is indicated below:

controls.control_objective: To ensure (1-3) august (4-6) november (7-9) --do--
controls.control_description:
Advances to single party/ connected group
- observance of RBI guidelines
May (1-3)
August (4-6)
November (7-9)
--do--
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to (1-3) august (4-6) november (7-9) --do--

controls.control_objective: To ensure (10-3) november (4-9) 10
controls.control_description:
Review of Customer Service

May (10-3)

November (4-9)
10.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to (10-3) november (4-9) 10

controls.control_objective: To ensure 6
controls.control_description:
UCB's Balance Sheet, Profit & Loss A/c., Working results May
6.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 6

controls.control_objective: To ensure 7
controls.control_description:
Review of loss-making branches May
7.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 7

controls.control_objective: To ensure 8
controls.control_description:
Analysis of wide variations in expenditure heads May
8.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 8

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up an audit committee at the board level for overseeing and providing directions to the internal audit / inspection machinery and other executives
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall set up an Audit Committee at the Board level for overseeing and
providing directions to the internal audit / inspection machinery and other
executives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up an audit committee at the board level for overseeing and providing directions to the internal audit / inspection machinery and other executives

controls.control_objective: To ensure consist of a chairman and three / four directors, one or more of such directors being chartered accountant or having experience in management, finance
controls.control_description:
The Audit Committee of the Board (ACB) of a UCB shall consist of a chairman
and three / four directors, one or more of such directors being chartered
accountant or having experience in management, finance or accountancy and
audit systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consist of a chairman and three / four directors, one or more of such directors being chartered accountant or having experience in management, finance

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the implementation of directions / guidelines issued by rbi and submit a note thereon to the board at quarterly intervals
controls.control_description:
The ACB of a UCB shall review the implementation of directions / guidelines
issued by RBI and submit a note thereon to the Board at quarterly intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to review the implementation of directions / guidelines issued by rbi and submit a note thereon to the board at quarterly intervals

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for the following major areas: (1) provide direction to and oversee the operations of the entire audit function in the ucb
controls.control_description:
Further, the ACB shall be responsible for the following major areas:
(1) provide direction to and oversee the operations of the entire audit function in
the UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for the following major areas: (1) provide direction to and oversee the operations of the entire audit function in the ucb

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the follow up action on the internal inspection reports with special focus on: i
controls.control_description:
It shall review the follow up
action on the internal inspection reports with special focus on:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the follow up action on the internal inspection reports with special focus on: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure set up a risk management committee of the board (rmcb) to focus the required level of attention on various aspects of risk management
controls.control_description:
Since the primary responsibility of risk management lies with the Board, a UCB
with an asset size of ₹5000 crore or above (as on March 31 of the previous year)
shall set up a Risk Management Committee of the Board (RMCB) to focus the
required level of attention on various aspects of risk management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set up a risk management committee of the board (rmcb) to focus the required level of attention on various aspects of risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure decide the membership, scope of work and frequency of meeting of the rmcb
controls.control_description:
The Board shall decide the membership, scope of work and frequency of meeting
of the RMCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to decide the membership, scope of work and frequency of meeting of the rmcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute a board of management (bom), by making suitable amendments to its bye-laws with the approval of the general body and registrar of co-operat
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall constitute a Board of Management (BoM), by making suitable
amendments to its bye-laws with the approval of the General Body and Registrar
of Co-operative Societies, to facilitate professional management and focused
attention to its banking-related activities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute a board of management (bom), by making suitable amendments to its bye-laws with the approval of the general body and registrar of co-operat

controls.control_objective: To ensure be (1) optional for a ucb having a deposit size of less than ₹100 crore or for a salary earners' co-operative bank
controls.control_description:
Provided that, the above requirement shall be
(1) optional for a UCB having a deposit size of less than ₹100 crore or for a Salary
Earners' Co-operative Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be (1) optional for a ucb having a deposit size of less than ₹100 crore or for a salary earners' co-operative bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute bom voluntarily, for having good governance practices
controls.control_description:
Such a UCB may constitute BoM voluntarily, for
having good governance practices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute bom voluntarily, for having good governance practices

controls.control_objective: To ensure forward a copy of the amended byelaws providing for constitution of bom to the concerned regional office of the department of supervision for informat
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall forward a copy of the amended byelaws providing for constitution of
BoM to the concerned Regional Office of the Department of Supervision for
information and record along with details of the members of BoM immediately
after constitution of BoM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to forward a copy of the amended byelaws providing for constitution of bom to the concerned regional office of the department of supervision for informat

controls.control_objective: To ensure also submit an annual return furnishing details of the members of the bom as per the format given in annex i as on december 31 each year, within 15 da
controls.control_description:
A UCB shall also submit an annual return furnishing details of the members of
the BoM as per the format given in Annex I as on December 31 each year, within
15 days of the end of the period to the respective Regional Office of Department
of Supervision of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also submit an annual return furnishing details of the members of the bom as per the format given in annex i as on december 31 each year, within 15 da

controls.control_objective: To ensure comprise a minimum of five and a maximum of twelve persons
controls.control_description:
The BoM of a UCB shall comprise a minimum of five and a maximum of twelve
persons.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comprise a minimum of five and a maximum of twelve persons

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out due diligence to determine the suitability of a person for appointment as a member of the bom, based upon qualification, expertise, track re
controls.control_description:
While constituting the BoM, the BoD of the UCB shall carry out due
diligence to determine the suitability of a person for appointment as a member of
the BoM, based upon qualification, expertise, track record, integrity and other 'fit
and proper' criteria indicated below:
(1) All members of BoM shall have special knowledge or practical experience in
respect of one or more of the following matters:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out due diligence to determine the suitability of a person for appointment as a member of the bom, based upon qualification, expertise, track re

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible
controls.control_description:
Any other subject, which would, in opinion of RBI, be useful to
the UCB
(2) Any person who has had a business relationship with the UCB during the
immediate preceding three years shall not be eligible.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as having business relationship with the ucb for the above purpose
controls.control_description:
Explanation: A person having deposits with a UCB shall not be classified
as having business relationship with the UCB for the above purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as having business relationship with the ucb for the above purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain information in the form of a declaration-cum-undertaking (format prescribed in annex ii) from the proposed member of the bom at the time of the
controls.control_description:
For carrying out the aforementioned due-diligence, the Board of a UCB shall
obtain information in the form of a declaration-cum-undertaking (format
prescribed in Annex II) from the proposed member of the BoM at the time of their
appointment and renewal of appointment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain information in the form of a declaration-cum-undertaking (format prescribed in annex ii) from the proposed member of the bom at the time of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure the following while constituting the bom: (1) while members of the bom may be drawn from the members of the bod (if they meet the specifie
controls.control_description:
Besides ensuring that members of BoM satisfy the 'Fit and Proper' Criteria as
prescribed in paragraph 21 of these Directions at all times, a UCB shall also
ensure the following while constituting the BoM:
(1) While members of the BoM may be drawn from the members of the BoD (if
they meet the specified criteria), not more than 50 per cent of the BoM
members shall be from BoD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also ensure the following while constituting the bom: (1) while members of the bom may be drawn from the members of the bod (if they meet the specifie

controls.control_objective: To ensure the ucbs concerned have no overlapping area of operation
controls.control_description:
(2) A member of BoM may be appointed in more than one UCB, subject to a
maximum of three, provided that the UCBs concerned have no overlapping
area of operation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the ucbs concerned have no overlapping area of operation

controls.control_objective: To ensure also apply to a member of a bom
controls.control_description:
(3) Any disqualification prescribed for a member of a BoD of a UCB under the
respective co-operative societies act shall also apply to a member of a BoM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also apply to a member of a bom

controls.control_objective: To ensure be elected by the members of bom from amongst themselves or appointed by the bod
controls.control_description:
(4) The Chairman of the BoM may be elected by the members of BoM from
amongst themselves or appointed by the BoD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be elected by the members of bom from amongst themselves or appointed by the bod

controls.control_objective: To ensure the chairman of the bod be appointed as chairman of the bom
controls.control_description:
However, under no
<image>
circumstances shall the Chairman of the BoD be appointed as Chairman of
the BoM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the chairman of the bod be appointed as chairman of the bom

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for the minimum or maximum requirement of five or twelve members specified in paragraph 21 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(5) The CEO shall be a non-voting member of the BoM and shall not be reckoned
for the minimum or maximum requirement of five or twelve members specified
in paragraph 21 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for the minimum or maximum requirement of five or twelve members specified in paragraph 21 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be co-terminus with the tenure of bod
controls.control_description: The tenure of BoM shall be co-terminus with the tenure of BoD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be co-terminus with the tenure of bod

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the following powers with respect to the bom of a ucb: (1) rbi may remove any member if the person is found to be not meeting the criteria prescr
controls.control_description:
RBI shall have the following powers with respect to the BoM of a UCB:
(1) RBI may remove any member if the person is found to be not meeting the
criteria prescribed by RBI or acting in a manner detrimental to the interests of
the UCB or its depositors or both;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the following powers with respect to the bom of a ucb: (1) rbi may remove any member if the person is found to be not meeting the criteria prescr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sought by the bod of a ucb before removing any member of the bom or accepting the resignation tendered by any member of the bom
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sought by the bod of a ucb before removing any member of the bom or accepting the resignation tendered by any member of the bom

controls.control_objective: To ensure supersede the bom if the functioning of bom is found unsatisfactory
controls.control_description:
and
(3) RBI may supersede the BoM if the functioning of BoM is found unsatisfactory.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to supersede the bom if the functioning of bom is found unsatisfactory

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint a new member or constitute a fresh bom, as applicable, within three months, during which the bod may assume the functions of the bom on an int
controls.control_description:
Provided that, in case of removal of a member or supersession of the BoM, the
BoD shall appoint a new member or constitute a fresh BoM, as applicable, within
three months, during which the BoD may assume the functions of the BoM on an
interim basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint a new member or constitute a fresh bom, as applicable, within three months, during which the bod may assume the functions of the bom on an int

controls.control_objective: To ensure exercise oversight over the banking related functions of the ucb, assist its board on formulation of policies and any other related matters specifical
controls.control_description:
The BoM of a UCB shall exercise oversight over the banking related functions of
the UCB, assist its Board on formulation of policies and any other related matters
specifically delegated to it by the Board for proper functioning of the UCB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exercise oversight over the banking related functions of the ucb, assist its board on formulation of policies and any other related matters specifical

controls.control_objective: To ensure include, inter alia, the following: (1) rendering expert advice on all proposals being put up to the board or any committee of the board for sanction
controls.control_description:
The
functions of the BoM shall include, inter alia, the following:
(1) Rendering expert advice on all proposals being put up to the Board or any
Committee of the Board for sanction of loans;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include, inter alia, the following: (1) rendering expert advice on all proposals being put up to the board or any committee of the board for sanction

controls.control_objective: To ensure , i
controls.control_description:
to ensure that policies are in tune with RBI guidelines
Provided that,
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , i

controls.control_objective: To ensure delegate such powers and responsibilities as deemed necessary for the proper functioning of the ucb while ensuring that there are no conflicts in powe
controls.control_description:
in addition to functions listed above, the BoD of a UCB may
delegate such powers and responsibilities as deemed necessary
for the proper functioning of the UCB while ensuring that there
are no conflicts in powers delegated to the Committees of the
Board and BoM;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to delegate such powers and responsibilities as deemed necessary for the proper functioning of the ucb while ensuring that there are no conflicts in powe

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so by recording, in writing, the reasons thereof
controls.control_description:
in an event where the Board of a UCB differs with the
recommendations of the BoM, it shall do so by recording, in
writing, the reasons thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so by recording, in writing, the reasons thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold meetings at such periodicity as deemed necessary
controls.control_description: The BoM of a UCB may hold meetings at such periodicity as deemed necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold meetings at such periodicity as deemed necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure be two-third of the total members of bom
controls.control_description: The quorum for the meeting shall be two-third of the total members of BoM.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be two-third of the total members of bom

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain proper record of the minutes of the meeting and the same shall be put up to bod
controls.control_description:
The
UCB shall maintain proper record of the minutes of the meeting and the same
shall be put up to BoD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain proper record of the minutes of the meeting and the same shall be put up to bod

controls.control_objective: To ensure be paid allowance / sitting fees for their services as may be provided for in the byelaws of the ucb or with the approval of the board
controls.control_description:
Members of the BoM of a UCB may be paid allowance / sitting fees for their
services as may be provided for in the byelaws of the UCB or with the approval
of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be paid allowance / sitting fees for their services as may be provided for in the byelaws of the ucb or with the approval of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in terms of section 35b(1)(b) read with section 56 of the banking regulation act, 1949, require the prior approval of rbi
controls.control_description:
The appointment, reappointment, and termination of appointment of a CEO / MD
shall, in terms of Section 35B(1)(b) read with Section 56 of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949, require the prior approval of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in terms of section 35b(1)(b) read with section 56 of the banking regulation act, 1949, require the prior approval of rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to rbi through the pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
Applications in this regard shall be submitted to RBI through the PRAVAAH
portal (https://pravaah.rbi.org.in).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to rbi through the pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint a cro
controls.control_description: A UCB having an asset size of ₹5000 crore or above, shall appoint a CRO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint a cro

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint or designate a cro within a period of six months from the end of that financial year
controls.control_description:
Provided that, a UCB which attains the asset size of ₹5,000 crore or above at the
end of a financial year shall appoint or designate a CRO within a period of six
months from the end of that financial year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint or designate a cro within a period of six months from the end of that financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a senior official in the hierarchy of a ucb and shall have adequate professional qualification / experience in the area of risk management
controls.control_description:
The CRO shall be a senior official in the hierarchy of a UCB and shall have
adequate professional qualification / experience in the area of risk management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a senior official in the hierarchy of a ucb and shall have adequate professional qualification / experience in the area of risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly define the cro's role and responsibilities and ensure that they function independently
controls.control_description:
The Board of a UCB shall clearly define the CRO's role and responsibilities and
ensure that they function independently.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly define the cro's role and responsibilities and ensure that they function independently

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place adequate policies to safeguard such independence
controls.control_description:
The Board shall put in place adequate
policies to safeguard such independence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place adequate policies to safeguard such independence

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that: (1) the cro shall have direct reporting lines to md / ceo or board or rmcb
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, it shall ensure that:
(1) the CRO shall have direct reporting lines to MD / CEO or Board or RMCB;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that: (1) the cro shall have direct reporting lines to md / ceo or board or rmcb

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the cro, without the presence of the md / ceo, at least on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
(2) in case the CRO reports to the MD / CEO, the Board or the RMC shall meet
the CRO, without the presence of the MD / CEO, at least on a quarterly basis;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the cro, without the presence of the md / ceo, at least on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any reporting relationship with the business verticals and shall not be given any business targets
controls.control_description:
(3) the CRO shall not have any reporting relationship with the business verticals
and shall not be given any business targets;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any reporting relationship with the business verticals and shall not be given any business targets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any 'dual hatting' i
controls.control_description:
(4) there shall not be any 'dual hatting' i.e., the CRO shall not be given any other
responsibility such as CEO, COO, CFO, Chief of the Internal Audit, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any 'dual hatting' i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be appointed for a fixed tenure with the approval of the board and may be transferred / removed from the post before completion of the tenure only wit
controls.control_description:
The CRO of a UCB shall be appointed for a fixed tenure with the approval of the
Board and may be transferred / removed from the post before completion of the
tenure only with the approval of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be appointed for a fixed tenure with the approval of the board and may be transferred / removed from the post before completion of the tenure only wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the concerned regional office of department of supervision, rbi
controls.control_description:
Such premature transfer / removal
shall be reported to the concerned Regional Office of Department of Supervision,
RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the concerned regional office of department of supervision, rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure support the board in establishing an integrated risk management system, capable of identifying, measuring and monitoring all types of risks on an ongo
controls.control_description:
The CRO shall support the Board in establishing an integrated risk management
system, capable of identifying, measuring and monitoring all types of risks on an
ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to support the board in establishing an integrated risk management system, capable of identifying, measuring and monitoring all types of risks on an ongo

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be involved in actual monitoring and mitigation of risks
controls.control_description:
The CRO shall
also be involved in actual monitoring and mitigation of risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be involved in actual monitoring and mitigation of risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure have voting power and all members who are part of the credit sanction process, shall individually and severally be liable for all the aspects, includi
controls.control_description:
In a UCB that follows committee approach in credit sanction process for high
value proposals, if the CRO is one of the decision makers in the credit sanction
process, the CRO shall have voting power and all members who are part of the
credit sanction process, shall individually and severally be liable for all the
aspects, including risk perspective related to the credit proposal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have voting power and all members who are part of the credit sanction process, shall individually and severally be liable for all the aspects, includi

controls.control_objective: To ensure have any sanctioning power
controls.control_description:
In a UCB that does not follow committee approach for sanction of high value
credits, the CRO can only be an adviser in the sanction process and shall not
have any sanctioning power.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have any sanctioning power

controls.control_objective: To ensure be vetted by the cro from the angle of inherent and control risks
controls.control_description:
All credit products shall be vetted by the CRO from the angle of inherent and
control risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be vetted by the cro from the angle of inherent and control risks

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and
guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as being governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed Directions / instructions /
guidelines shall be deemed as being governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as being governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.control_description:
Further, the
repeal of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way
prejudicially affect:
(1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be necessary for a candidate to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which <image> have been later on reversed / set asi
controls.control_description:
(Though it shall not be necessary for a
candidate to mention in the column about
orders and findings made by regulators which
<image>
have been later on reversed / set aside in toto,
it would be necessary to make a mention of
the same, in case the reversal / setting aside
is on technical reasons like limitation or lack
of jurisdiction, etc., and not on merit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be necessary for a candidate to mention in the column about orders and findings made by regulators which <image> have been later on reversed / set asi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mentioned)
controls.control_description:
If the
order of the regulator is temporarily stayed
and the appellate / court proceedings are
pending, the same also should be
mentioned).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mentioned)
